title: Entry-Level Radiologist at Ruby Hall Clinic

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Radiologist at Ruby Hall Clinic
jsonLd.description:
Ruby Hall Clinic, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Radiologist for our Howrah operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Ruby Hall Clinic:
Ruby Hall Clinic is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Patient Care

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ruby Hall Clinic!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
